title: Amazon Books India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Amazon Books India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Amazon Books India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Amazon Books India:
Amazon Books India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon Books India!
